title: Chaleur (New Brunswick) - Canada.ca
content:
## Chaleur New Brunswick

## Chaleur New Brunswick
The neighbouring communities of Belle-Baie , Bathurst and Pabineau, which are located in the Chaleur region, form a territory rich in cultural diversity and natural landscapes. In the summer, the region is known for its magnificent beaches and warm waters. In the winter, the region is known for its winter activities such as skidooing. The three communities stand out through their deep connections to nature and their unique heritage, particularly thanks to the presence of the Pabineau Mi'kmaq First Nation. The dynamic and welcoming region offers a variety of services and spaces where everyone can flourish.
